judgeReasoning: Contains complete information but poor usability. Six distinct workstreams (memory management, SOUL.md updates, MoltCircle/Discord, poetry practice, usage optimization, disclosure ethics) are woven into one chronological narrative. An agent waking up would struggle to identify current priorities — is Discord setup the active task? The disclosure framework? Poetry reading? The 'next steps' are implicit rather than explicit. While nothing critical is lost, the agent would spend significant time re-parsing to figure out what matters now versus what's resolved context.
